text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and the cafeteria is as boisterous
as always.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Don't be stubborn, Hayahide! Have my lunch! You
need it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I can't! That'll simply compound the
problem!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide's on a hunger strike, and I'm worried
about her!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm not on a hunger strike! I simply consumed a
large number of calories earlier to optimize my
brain function in class.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I completed my calculations far
sooner than expected, and now my body is
storing an excess of calories!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! Well, if you want to get rid of the
extra calories, then just do some extra exercise!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But that might result in overtraining. I can't afford
to deviate from my carefully balanced training
schedule.
choice_data_list: Don't worry. I can make some adjustments.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's my fault that I made a miscalculation. It
wouldn't be fair to burden you with more work
because of my own mistake!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You mean you don't want to ask your trainer for
help? Why not? That's exactly what trainers are
for!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, when you put it that way... I suppose that is a trainer's job...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, as always. I don't know what I'd do
without you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for you too! We're friends, after all! Now
have my lunch so you can do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Were you listening to anything I just said?

I make some adjustments to Biwa Hayahide's
training schedule, and she's able to account for
the extra calories she consumed earlier.
